_nota: Quenya — attested words used where possible (Eldamo.net / Ardalambion). Neologisms coined in Quenya style marked with (*) in this comment only. parma=file, tië=path, lambë=language, alassë=joy/success, raxë=peril/error, carda=task, envinyata=restore, namárië=farewell, harya=preserve, carmë=craft/working-dir, quenta=history, tengwa=pattern, sí=now/current, Aman=blessed destination, Mandos=archive
VERSION:
# Quenta Parmaron
* `A` _13/04/2026_
	* Yesta — Minë Quenta (First tale)
* `B` _27/04/2026_
	* Tangwa .pygnore, carda-tengwar vinya
* `C` _06/05/2026_
	* Parma-cantëa (*configfile) orë-haryaina. Tengwar Pygnore ar Harya-Parma (*Save) yestanë
* `D` _13/05/2026_
	* Quanta lambë vinya antainë (*many new languages added), ar tengwar pathtree, checksum, readme ar ailë. Lambë-rimba (*multilingual) polë cantaina ilya tengwar PyGit-o ar tenn' i orë-carda (*program internals)
ABOUT:
# Haryandir Parmaron (*Save Manager)
* Nandë (*local) harya-parmaron (*backup manager)
* Envinyataina (*inspired) Github ar Git-ello
* Attë (*two) nótierë (*versions) polë (*available): Calma-quetë (*CLI, the lamp-speech) ar Cénalë (*GUI, the seeing-craft, lá carainë yet)
PYGNORE_RAPPEL:
Ista nótierë i rimbë (*priority reminder):
 1) Sí i tengwa (*pattern) ar cormë (*type) cantëa (*match) include-rimbë, i parma (*file) nótëa (*counted in).
 2) Sí cantëa exclude-rimbë, i parma auta (*goes away).
 3) Ilya (*all) parmar haryanë (*kept) sí-yúla (*by default).
main_hint: Quetë [cyan]help[/cyan] cenuvan (*to see) i tengwar (*commands) polëa (*available).
main_unknown_cmd: '{cmd}' — lá ista tengwa. (*unknown command) Quetë 'help', nér.
wdir_none: [yellow]Lá carmë (*no working directory) cantaina (*defined). Quetë setwdir, nér.[/yellow]
setwdir_ask: Anta vinya tië-carmë (*new working dir path, absolute):
psetpath_ask:
Sí tië (*current path): {path}.
Anta (*give) vinya tië .pygnore, ó quetë 'exit' sí i tië ná (*is) mára (*good):
paddexclude_ask_type: Mana (*what) cormë (*type) exclude-cantaina? (*to be excluded) 'fi' parma (*file) ó 'fo' coivë-parma (*folder):
paddexclude_ask_pattern: Mana tengwa (*pattern) exclude-cantaina? Lá essë (*not exact name): anta ziril (*star, wildcard) (ex: *.log):
paddinclude_ask_type: Mana cormë (*type) include-cantaina? 'fi' parma (*file) ó 'fo' coivë-parma (*folder):
paddinclude_ask_pattern: Mana tengwa (*pattern) include-cantaina? Lá essë: anta ziril (*wildcard) (ex: *.py):
pdelexclude_ask_type: Mana cormë i exclude hauta-cantaina (*to be removed)? `fi` ó `fo`:
pdelinclude_ask_type: Mana cormë i include hauta-cantaina? `fi` ó `fo`:
pneedtoinclude_no: [yellow]Lá. (*No.) I parma lá nótëa i harya-canta.[/yellow]
pneedtoinclude_error: [yellow]Raxë orë tenn' i carda (*during the task):[/yellow] {e}
save_missing_config: [bold red]Raxë:[/bold red] Lá orë-parma (*no config). Quetë `setdir` ar `setwdir`, nér!
save_action: [bold blue]Carda![/bold blue] (*Task!) Harya-parma (*saving) [cyan]{src}[/cyan] na (*to) Aman (*blessed dest) [cyan]{dest}[/cyan]
dryrun_missing_config: [bold red]Raxë:[/bold red] Lá orë-parma. Quetë `setdir` ar `setwdir`, nér!
dryrun_no_diff: Lá quantainë (*no differences) [cyan]{src}[/cyan] ar [cyan]{dest}[/cyan] nosse (*between). Mára!
restore_ask_dest: Mana tië (*what path) i envinyatë (*restore) harya-parma?
restore_ask_from_current: Á lerta (*permit) envinyata (*restore) i sí-Mandos (*current archive)?
restore_integrity_fail: [red]Envinyatë (*restore) carinë nan (*but) raxë orë i nótierë-hrívë (*integrity check). Mornë![/red]
setlang_error: [red]Raxë,[/red][bold] i lambë lá polëa (*not available). Envinyata (*falling back) Englandë-lambëanna (*to English)[/bold]
checkfiles_error: [red]Raxë:[/red] Minë i parmar (*one of the files) lá ëa (*does not exist)
checkfiles_ok: [green]Ilyë: [/green]Lá quantainë nosse i attë parmar (*no differences). Mára!
checkfolder_nodiff: [green]Ilyë: [/green]Lá quantainë nosse i attë coivë-parmar. Mára!
gettree_verbose: Á lerta i alda-cénë (*tree search) quantaina (*verbose) carë?
doc_help: Cen (*see) i nótierë tengwar (*list of commands)
doc_clear: Hauta i calma-vista (*clear the lamp-view / terminal)
doc_paddexclude: Anta tengwa exclude-nótierëanna (*add to exclude list)
doc_paddinclude: Anta tengwa include-nótierëanna (*add to include list)
doc_pdelexclude: Hauta tengwa exclude-nótierëllo (*remove from exclude list)
doc_pdelinclude: Hauta tengwa include-nótierëllo (*remove from include list)
doc_dryrun: Cénima-carda (*dry run) — cen quantainë lá carë
doc_checkfiles: Cen (*compare) i yesta parmar (*two files, .txt, .mp4, etc.)
doc_checkfolder: Cen i yesta coivë-parmar (*two folders, default: dir ar wdir)
doc_gettree: Orta ar cen i alda (*tree) coivë-parma (essë, rimbë, tengwa, etc.)
doc_readdryrun: Henta i parma dryrun.txt (suadë: cénima-carda sí carë)
jtot_error: Raxë: i parma {path} lá ëa (*does not exist)
save_warning: Raxë-mírë (*warning): i Mandos (*archive) vinya-rimbë (*more recent) ná na carmë (*than working dir)
restore_choice:
{filelist}
Á sáma (*choose) minë i parmar (*one of the files) or quetë 'exit':
